overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open-world video game showing a character wearing a poncho walking along a desert dirt trail surrounded by cacti and red rock formations under harsh midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail through dense prickly pear cactus grove

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail surrounded by dense cactus vegetation

entered.detail: dense cluster of flat-padded cacti lining the left side of the trail
tall columnar cactus with arms visible in the distance on the left
sandy dirt path winding through the desert landscape
distant reddish-brown rock outcrops on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a desert trail surrounded by dense groves of prickly pear cacti. A tall saguaro cactus looms ahead on the left while distant red rock formations rise against the clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail intersection with wooden signage

events.description: character passes tall saguaro cactus on the left side of the trail
wooden signpost becomes visible at the trail intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail, approaching a wooden signpost at an intersection

entered.detail: weathered wooden sign with directional arrows at trail intersection
large reddish rock formation on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character passes the tall saguaro cactus and leaves the dense cactus grove behind. The vegetation thins to desert shrubs as a wooden signpost comes into view at a trail intersection, with large boulders visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert trail approaching large outcrops

events.description: character passes the wooden signpost and continues past the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking past the signpost and heading toward the large rock formations ahead

entered.detail: massive layered rock formation rising prominently on the left side

segments.scene_description: Passing the wooden signpost, the character enters a more open area with sparse vegetation. Large rock outcrops dominate the left side of the trail as the path continues toward distant desert mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desert trail that transitions from dense cactus groves into a wide, rocky expanse. It begins with the character walking through thick clusters of prickly pear cacti, moving toward a towering saguaro and distant red rock formations under a clear blue sky. As the character passes the saguaro, the dense vegetation thins into scattered desert shrubs, leading the camera toward a wooden signpost at a trail intersection flanked by large boulders. The scene then opens further into a sparse landscape where the path clears, shifting the focus toward massive rock outcrops on the left before continuing toward distant desert mountains.
